query: 规模top100基金中本年以来收益最高的10只

args.sql: WITH latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size), top100_by_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_size FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_size_date) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT s.fund_code AS 基金代码, s.fund_name AS 基金名称, ROUND(s.fund_size, 2) AS 基金规模_亿元, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 本年以来收益率 FROM top100_by_size s JOIN fund_performance p ON s.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 先获取规模表最新日期，取规模前100基金，然后关联业绩表筛选'本年以来'收益，按收益率降序取前10。

notes: 使用基金规模最新日期
业绩区间默认为'本年以来'
先获取规模表最新日期，取规模前100基金，然后关联业绩表筛选'本年以来'收益，按收益率降序取前10。
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size), top100_by_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_size FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_size_date) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT s.fund_code AS 基金代码, s.fund_name AS 基金名称, ROUND(s.fund_size, 2) AS 基金规模_亿元, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 本年以来收益率 FROM top100_by_size s JOIN fund_performance p ON s.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10;

args.sql: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size), size_top100 AS (SELECT fs.fund_code, fs.fund_name, fs.fund_size FROM fund_size fs JOIN latest_date ld ON fs.date = ld.max_date ORDER BY fs.fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT sp.fund_code AS "基金代码", sp.fund_name AS "基金名称", ROUND(sp.fund_size, 2) AS "基金规模", ROUND(fp.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS "本年以来收益率(%)" FROM size_top100 sp INNER JOIN fund_performance fp ON sp.fund_code = fp.fund_code AND fp.period = '本以来' ORDER BY fp.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10;
